# ClinKit

[![Codecov test
coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/LeafLight/ClinKit/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/LeafLight/ClinKit)
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/LeafLight/ClinKit/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/LeafLight/ClinKit/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
[![License:
MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

**ClinKit** is an advanced R framework tailored for clinical researchers
and epidemiologists. It transforms cleaned datasets into
publication-ready artifacts (Word tables and high-resolution figures)
through a standardized, modular, and highly reproducible workflow.

## 🌟 Key Highlights

- **⚡ Interactive Scaffolding**: Deploy a complete clinical project
  structure and master control center with a single command.
- **📈 Hierarchical Sequential Modeling**: Automatically generate Model
  1 (Unadjusted) through Model N (Fully Adjusted) for Logistic, Cox PH,
  and Multinomial regressions.
- **🧪 Built-in Methodological Rigor**: Automated normality testing for
  intelligent descriptive statistics and “Anti-Cartesian” alignment for
  multi-level outcome reporting.
- **📄 Journal-Ready Outputs**: Unified I/O routing with auto-formatted
  `.docx` tables (standardized Times New Roman and three-line table
  layout).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📦 Installation

You can install the development version of ClinKit from GitHub:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("LeafLight/ClinKit")

---


## 🚀 The ClinKit Workflow (Standard Operating Procedure)

ClinKit enforces a "Configuration-Driven" modular workflow to ensure your research is audit-proof and reproducible.

### Step 1: Initialize the Environment

```r
library(ClinKit)
use_clinkit_project() 
```

This creates a standardized directory structure (`data/`, `scripts/`,
`results/`) and the **`00_Master_Config.R`** dashboard.

### Step 2: Global Variable Configuration

Open `00_Master_Config.R` to define your outcomes, primary predictors,
and hierarchical adjustment layers (Model 1-N).

### Step 3: Deploy Analysis Modules

Run the following functions within your config center to generate
standalone, task-specific scripts:

``` r
use_module_baseline()      # Deploys Table 1 (Patient Characteristics)
use_module_multivariable() # Deploys Table 3 (Sequential Adjusted Models)
use_module_rcs()           # Deploys Non-linear Trend Analysis (RCS)
use_module_forest()        # Deploys Subgroup Interaction Plots
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🛠 Core Analytical Suite

### 1. Automated Baseline Reporting (`make_baseline_table`)

Features built-in Shapiro-Wilk/KS testing. It automatically switches
between `Mean ± SD` and `Median (IQR)` based on distribution and exports
directly to publication-quality Word documents.

### 2. Hierarchical Regression Engines

- **[`run_multivariable_logistic_regression()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_multivariable_logistic_regression.md)**:
  Standardized Adjusted Odds Ratios (aOR).
- **[`run_multivariable_cox_regression()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_multivariable_cox_regression.md)**:
  Sequential Adjusted Hazard Ratios (aHR).
- **[`run_multivariable_multinomial_logistic_regression()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_multivariable_multinomial_logistic_regression.md)**:
  Handling multi-category outcomes with perfect row alignment across
  adjustment levels.

### 3. Advanced Visualization & Analytics

- **[`generate_rcs_plot()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/generate_rcs_plot.md)**:
  Restricted Cubic Splines with multi-model support.
- **[`subgroup_forest()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/subgroup_forest.md)**:
  Subgroup interaction forest plots with professional color themes
  (Blue, Green, Cyan).
- **[`run_reclassification_analysis()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_reclassification_analysis.md)**:
  Comprehensive calculation of NRI (Net Reclassification Index) and IDI
  (Integrated Discrimination Improvement).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 💎 Why ClinKit?

| Feature                  | ClinKit Framework            | Traditional R Scripting          |
|--------------------------|------------------------------|----------------------------------|
| **Adjustment Layers**    | Automated (Model 1-N)        | Manual formula rewriting         |
| **Reference Categories** | Auto-persisted (1.00 (Ref))  | Manual row insertions            |
| **I/O Management**       | Unified routing & timestamps | Scattered `ggsave` / `write.csv` |
| **Reproducibility**      | Config-driven modularity     | Fragile, monolithic scripts      |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📖 Documentation

For full function references and step-by-step case studies, please
visit: **[ClinKit Documentation
Portal](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/index.html)**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Methodological contributions, bug reports, and pull requests are
welcome!

- **Author**: [Hualin Wang](NA)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`facet_violin()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/facet_violin.md)
  : Faceted Violin Plot
- [`format_p_value()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/format_p_value.md)
  : Format p-value as plotmath expression string
- [`generate_rcs_plot()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/generate_rcs_plot.md)
  : Restricted Cubic Splines (RCS) Logistic Regression with Plot
- [`get_forest_theme()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/get_forest_theme.md)
  [`tm_blue()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/get_forest_theme.md)
  [`tm_green()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/get_forest_theme.md)
  [`tm_cyan()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/get_forest_theme.md)
  [`tm_default()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/get_forest_theme.md)
  : Get Predefined Forest Plot Themes
- [`highlow_analysis()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/highlow_analysis.md)
  : High-High vs Low-Low Four-Group Logistic Regression with Additive
  Interaction
- [`is_normal_overall()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/is_normal_overall.md)
  : Check if all groups for a variable are normal
- [`make_baseline_table()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/make_baseline_table.md)
  : One-Click Baseline Characteristics Table (gtsummary version)
- [`perform_normality_tests()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/perform_normality_tests.md)
  : Perform normality tests for continuous variables by group
- [`print_normality_summary()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/print_normality_summary.md)
  : Print summary of normality test results
- [`quartile_logistic_analysis()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/quartile_logistic_analysis.md)
  : Quartile-based Logistic Regression Analysis
- [`quartile_multinomial_analysis()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/quartile_multinomial_analysis.md)
  : Quartile-based Multinomial Logistic Regression Analysis
- [`roc_analysis()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/roc_analysis.md)
  : ROC Curve Analysis with AUC Comparison and Optimal Cutoff
- [`run_analysis_rcs()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_analysis_rcs.md)
  : Batch RCS Analysis
- [`run_multivariable_cox_regression()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_multivariable_cox_regression.md)
  : Dynamic Sequential Multivariable Cox Proportional Hazards Regression
- [`run_multivariable_logistic_regression()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_multivariable_logistic_regression.md)
  : Dynamic Sequential Multivariable Logistic Regression
- [`run_multivariable_multinomial_logistic_regression()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_multivariable_multinomial_logistic_regression.md)
  : Dynamic Sequential Multivariable Multinomial Logistic Regression
- [`run_reclassification_analysis()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_reclassification_analysis.md)
  : Reclassification Analysis (NRI & IDI)
- [`run_univariate_logistic_regression()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/run_univariate_logistic_regression.md)
  : Univariate Logistic Regression Analysis
- [`scatter_lm()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/scatter_lm.md)
  : Scatter Plot with Regression Line (Basic Version)
- [`scatter_lm_marginal()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/scatter_lm_marginal.md)
  : Scatter Plot with Marginal Density/Histogram and Regression Equation
  (Enhanced Version)
- [`subgroup_forest()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/subgroup_forest.md)
  : Forest Plot for Subgroup Analysis
- [`use_clinkit_project()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/use_clinkit_project.md)
  : Initialize a ClinKit Analysis Project
- [`use_module_baseline()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/use_module_baseline.md)
  : Generate Baseline Table Module Script
- [`use_module_forest()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/use_module_forest.md)
  : Generate Subgroup Forest Plot Module Script
- [`use_module_highlow()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/use_module_highlow.md)
  : Generate High-Low Joint Analysis Module Script
- [`use_module_multivariable()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/use_module_multivariable.md)
  : Generate Multivariable Analysis Module Script
- [`use_module_nri()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/use_module_nri.md)
  : Generate Reclassification Analysis Module Script
- [`use_module_rcs()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/use_module_rcs.md)
  : Generate RCS Plot Module Script
- [`use_module_univariate()`](https://leaflight.github.io/ClinKit/reference/use_module_univariate.md)
  : Generate Univariate Analysis Module Script
